tasks.title: Review payment processing options.
tasks.desc: Roy will review payment processing options and make recommendations to see what might be the best fit to automate payments through HostAway and the OTAs.

tasks.title: Create Expedia listings
tasks.desc: Expedia only has one listing so far. Create all the remaining listings on Expedia so I can sync it with Hostaway.

tasks.title: Update listings on Hostaway
tasks.desc: Make sure all the fields in Hostaway are correct for each listing after I've imported them from Airbnb. This will help better push information to the OTAs.

tasks.title: Create Booking.com account
tasks.desc: Make sure to add all your legal business information as will need a legal identity ID from Booking.com to connect to Hostaway
